title: Three big round UFOs followed a plane near Corumbá-MS [1997]
excerpt: APRIL 7th, 1997. Time: 18h30. Duration: 35 minutes. text_preview: APRIL 7th, 1997. Time: 18h30. Duration: 35 minutes. In the vicinity of Corumbá, State of Mato Grosso do Sul, from the cabin of his PTVOY aircraft, a commercial pilot and two other people observed three unidentified flying objects about 60NM [nautical miles] from the plane. The UFOs, according to the sighting report, flew at an altitude of approximately 5,000 ft, with the same speed as the witness plane, at about 160 kt [about 300 km/h]. The UFOs had circular shape and were large, with colors varying between orange, white and yellow, flashing like “strobe lights” in the “2 o’clock” position in
summary: A commercial pilot and two passengers aboard PTVOY observed three large circular orange-white-yellow flashing UFOs pacing their aircraft near Corumbá for 35 minutes on April 7, 1997.
